author.bio: Web3 Foundation is building an internet where users are in control of their own data, identity and destiny. Our primary project is @polkadotnetwork.
author.name: Web3 Foundation

content.html:
“Some Web3 values are: freedom of speech(secure self-publishing), freedom of assembly, users own & control their data, decentralized, privacy, dependable, trustless, & robust infrastructure.”

@juanbenet from @protocollabs on "Building Web3" @web3summit.
https://youtu.be/pJOG5Ql7ZD0
